The README now accurately reflects all implemented features.

commit.message:
android: fix graph, alarm display, connect button

- LiveChart: initialize seriesList (Voltage/left + Current/right),
  use appendTo(0,t,v) / appendTo(1,t,i) instead of non-existent
  addPoint(). Graph was silently failing on every sample.

- MonitorTab: add full-width alarm banner (OVP/OCP/OPP/OTP) below
  the readings row. More prominent than the small badge alone.
  Fix OTP alarm label (was falling through to 'ALARM').

- SettingsTab: drive Connect button enabled from restSettings.restUrl
  instead of restUrlField.text to avoid stale binding at load time.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Update R/update_readme_log.R

Update R/update_readme_log.R

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Filter out conflicts where both PRs have the same author

If a developer has two of their own PRs conflicting, they likely
already know about it and don't need a Slack notification.

Changes:
- Added same-author filtering after conflict detection
- Filters out conflicts where pr_a.author == pr_b.author
- Prints count of filtered conflicts when > 0
- Added test to verify filtering behavior

Example output:
  'Filtered 3 same-author conflict(s) (12 remaining)'

Test status: 178 tests passing, 100% coverage on orchestrator, 9.99/10 pylint

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix: Convert error objects to strings in AuthContext

- AuthContext was throwing error objects which React cannot render
- Convert error objects to JSON strings for safe rendering
- Ensures error messages are always strings, not objects
- Fixes React error #31: Objects are not valid as a React child

commit.message:
feat: inline editable scores replace Report button on Live page

- Remove the Report button and form overlay entirely
- Score fields are now inline editable inputs next to team names
- Scores auto-submit on blur when both teams have values
- Tentative (pending) scores display in grey
- Pre-fill inputs with pending scores from server on page load
- Completed matches show non-editable approved scores
- Supports both single_set and best_of_3 scoring formats
- Toast and pending badge still shown on successful submission

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix state file persistence and dry run behavior

- Remove .pr-conflict-state.json from .gitignore
  - State file now commits to repo for persistence between runs
  - Fixes issue where deduplication state was lost each run

- Update dry run mode to skip state file saving
  - DRY_RUN=true now prevents state file modifications
  - Allows testing without affecting deduplication state
  - Added test to verify save_state is not called in dry run

Test status: 177 tests passing, 9.99/10 pylint

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: Drei UI-Bugs behoben (Fenstergröße, Dezimaltrennzeichen, GDI+)

ConfigurationForm (Fenstergröße):
- Formular-Größe von 420x460 auf 440x560 erhöht
- Schaltflächen 'Übernehmen'/'Abbrechen' sind jetzt vollständig sichtbar
  und zugänglich (y = ClientSize.Height - 52 passt automatisch)

MainForm (Dezimaltrennzeichen):
- ApplySettingsToUi(): ToString() mit InvariantCulture → '49.4875' statt '49,4875'
- ReadCoordinatesFromUi(): neue Hilfsmethode liest Koordinaten mit
  InvariantCulture zurück, wird vor jedem RefreshWallpaperAsync() aufgerufen
  → manuelle Koordinatenänderungen werden korrekt übernommen

WallpaperGeneratorService (GDI+ Fehler):
- DrawBackground(): PathGradientBrush benötigt mind. 3 Punkte (geschlossener Pfad)
- War mit 1 Punkt initialisiert → ArgumentException 'Value does not fall within
  the expected range (Parameter points)'
- Korrigiert auf 3-Punkte-Dreieck um den Bildmittelpunkt

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: Quick wins – 14-day Pro trial, daily streaks, push notifications, voice notes (#7)

* Initial plan

* feat: implement quick-win monetization features

- Add TrialManagerService: 14-day Pro trial lifecycle (start, status,
  batch expiry via atomic CTE, double-trial prevention)
- Add StreakManagerService: daily activity tracking, freeze credits,
  milestone awards (7/30/100/365 days), leaderboard, nightly check
- Add VoiceNotesProcessor: keyword-based transcript analysis (5
  sentiment categories, tags, game detection), note persistence
- Add subscriptionRoutes: POST /start-trial, GET /trial-status,
  POST /expire-trials (cron)
- Add streakRoutes: GET /, POST /activity, GET /leaderboard,
  POST /nightly-check (cron)
- Add sessionNotesRoutes: POST/GET /sessions/:sessionId/notes
- Add requireTier() feature gate middleware with trial bypass
- Add push subscription endpoints (POST/DELETE /notifications/subscribe)
- Add notification preferences endpoints (GET/PUT /preferences)
- Add sendTrialStartEmail, sendTrialEndingEmail, sendTrialExpiredEmail
- Register new routes in routes/index.ts

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: add streaks, trial, voice notes, notifications, and leaderboard frontend components

- hooks/useStreak.ts — TanStack Query wrapper for daily streak API
- hooks/useSpeechRecognition.ts — Web Speech API hook with transcript accumulation and permission error handling
- lib/sentiment-analyzer.ts — pure sentiment classifier (5 categories) with tag extraction
- components/dashboard/DailyStreakWidget.tsx — daily check-in widget with fire emoji, shields, milestone progress bar
- components/layout/TrialBanner.tsx — dismissible trial countdown banner with local-timezone daily reset
- components/onboarding/TrialActivation.tsx — 14-day Pro trial activation modal with loading/error states
- components/sessions/VoiceNoteRecorder.tsx — voice/text note recorder with waveform animation and reduced-motion support
- components/sessions/VoiceNotePlayback.tsx — session note list with voice/text type badges
- components/settings/NotificationPreferences.tsx — toggle panel for 7 pref types + browser push subscription
- pages/StreakLeaderboard.tsx — ranked leaderboard with gold/silver/bronze styling and skeleton loading
- pages/NotificationsInbox.tsx — full inbox with 5 filter tabs, mark-all-read, per-item read
- lib/api.ts — added subscriptions, streaks, sessionNotes namespaces; extended notifications with preferences/push
- pages/DashboardPage.tsx — DailyStreakWidget rendered beside StreakWidget in 2-col grid
- components/layout/AppShell.tsx — TrialBanner above Outlet; Streak Board and Notifications added to Engage nav
- routeTree.tsx — registered /streaks/leaderboard and /notifications routes
- public/sw.js — minimal service worker for Web Push (push event + notificationclick)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: implement all 4 quick wins features (trials, streaks, push notifications, voice notes)

Co-authored-by: VpkDevs <183775731+VpkDevs@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

stablize accept_replies (#693)

commit.message:
fix: set CaskaydiaCove NF font in WT defaults so OMP glyphs render

Without this, oh-my-posh installs the Nerd Font but Windows Terminal
keeps using the default Cascadia Code (no glyphs) - all OMP symbols
render as diamond fallback characters.

Sets profiles.defaults.font.face = 'CaskaydiaCove NF' in WT settings.json
during the Section 11 Windows Terminal configuration step.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Tambah section Produk Unggulan: Merge PDF & ORIXA POS

- Tambah section Produk Unggulan antara Proyek dan Kontak
- Merge PDF: tool gratis gabung PDF/JPG/PNG online (merge-pdf.sta.my.id)
- ORIXA POS: platform POS multi-tenant untuk UMKM & retail (orixa.sta.my.id)

commit.message:
fix: add cffi wheels for Python 3.9, 3.10, 3.13, 3.14

vendor/ previously only had cffi 2.0.0 for cp311 and cp312.
Any Windows machine running Python 3.9, 3.10, 3.13, or 3.14 would
fail setup.bat with 'no matching distribution found for cffi>=2.0.0'.

Added wheels for all supported Python versions:
  cp39  — Python 3.9
  cp310 — Python 3.10
  cp311 — Python 3.11 (existing)
  cp312 — Python 3.12 (existing)
  cp313 — Python 3.13
  cp314 — Python 3.14

commit.message:
chore: remove accidental .python-version from repo root

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: always install Python 3.10 before resolving binary path

The previous logic called get_python_bin() first, which fell back to
'python3' (system Python 3.14 on macOS runners) when brew python@3.10
wasn't installed. Since 'command -v python3' succeeded, install_python()
was never called, and uv sync created a 3.14 venv.

Fix: always call install_python() (idempotent), then resolve the path.
Also use 'uv python pin' to explicitly pin the interpreter for uv sync.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add Project Risk Simulation Dashboard (React + TS + Vite)

Complete implementation including:
- React 18 + TypeScript + Vite scaffold
- TailwindCSS v3 dark dashboard theme
- Recharts: scatter, ranking bar, grouped bar charts
- jsPDF + jspdf-autotable for PDF export
- PapaParse for CSV export
- Real-time scoring: score = benefitW*benefit - riskW*risk - costW*normalizedCost
- Up to 5 scenarios with sliders, editable names, delete
- WeightControls panel, ScenarioTable, best scenario highlighting
- Header with Add/Reset/Export buttons

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(azure-devops): simplify foundation bundle URL to repo root

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: bump version to v1.5.2-beta.6

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: QA Pass 3 — resolve all 16 findings

Critical:
- C-1: Compute real SHA-256 fingerprint in _ToFUPolicy (was MD5)
  Uses hashlib.sha256(key.asbytes()) + base64; label is now accurate
- C-2: _save_host_key() now schedules _update_status_bar via after(0,...)
  instead of calling it directly from the SSH background thread

High:
- H-1: Remove dead code block in _dpapi_decrypt (CryptProtectData.__class__ check)
- H-2: Remove transport._preferred_keys private attribute access (redundant + fragile)
- H-3: Validate IP/subnet/gateway format in _apply_ip_change before sending command
- H-4: Add TRANSFER_TIMEOUT (300s) on ftp.sock before storbinary() call
- H-5: Reset _current_device/_current_user via self.after(0, _reset) on main thread

Medium:
- M-1: Add timeout=10 to sqlite3.connect() in get_connection()
- M-2: Remove pyinstaller from requirements.txt; add requirements-build.txt
- M-3: Remove macholib wheel from vendor/ (macOS-only, unused on Windows)
- M-4: Rewrite setup.bat shortcut creation using temp .ps1 file to avoid
  empty ICON_LINE being passed as a PowerShell argument
- NEW-1: Use os.path.samefile() in _do_import_database instead of string compare
- NEW-2: Validate imported file is a real SQLite DB before overwriting active DB

Low:
- L-1: MultiInputDialog._confirm() preserves whitespace in password fields
- L-2: PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL moved to initialize_db() only (was every connection)
- NEW-3: Firmware on_complete lambda now calls self.after(0, _update_status_bar)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

the same flex row, so they remain fixed while diff content scrolls.

helper function. This eliminates 12 lines of duplicated code across Button,
TextInput, Label, and ScrollView Draw methods.

- Add drawContext struct to hold resolved draw parameters
- Refactor Button.Draw to use prepareDrawContext
- Refactor TextInput.Draw to use prepareDrawContext
- Refactor Label.Draw to use prepareDrawContext
- Refactor ScrollView.Draw to use prepareDrawContext

Impact:
- Duplication ratio: 0.32% → 0% (eliminated 12 duplicate lines)
- Code quality score: 100/100 (maintained)
- No behavioral changes
- All tests pass, go vet clean

commit.message:
Enable screen saver and keep-display-on by default (#45)

* Enable screen saver and keep-display-on by default

Most users will want the display to stay on (since the HAP server
can't run in the background) with the screen saver active. Change
both defaults to true and only override from UserDefaults when a
saved value exists, so existing users who explicitly disabled them
keep their preference. Rename the card title to "Keep Display On"
for clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update Pylo/HAPViewModel.swift

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Bump version to 0.3.2

Changes since v0.3.1:
- Tighten all MCP tool descriptions to ≤35 words
- Rename helix_test_results → helix_parse_uploaded_trx
- Add Idempotent annotation to all read-only tools
- README overhaul and documentation improvements
- CI knowledge base refresh and investigation guidance fixes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

perf(frontend): optimize performance across target routes

- Reduce Sentry tracesSampleRate 1.0→0.2, replaysOnErrorSampleRate 1.0→0.5
- Compress logo PNGs from 1.5MB to ~80KB total (pngquant)
- Remove preload for Medium+SemiBold fonts (-114KB critical path)
- Add loading.jsx skeletons for /account/validation-cases,
  /account/wallet/withdraw, /admin/login
- Parallelize 4 sequential API calls in /account page (Promise.allSettled)
- Dynamic import heavy sections: GuaranteeSection, PasskeySettings,
  TOTPSettings, TelegramAuthSection, DeleteAccountSection
- Dynamic import MarkdownEditor+MarkdownPreview in /validation-cases/new
- Extract MarkdownPreview components object outside render (25+ defs)
- Add useMemo for social accounts in UserProfileClient
- Add useCallback for handler functions in /account page

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Remove WorkIQ auth step from installer

workiq ask triggers browser OAuth which fails silently in PS5.1
subprocess context - hangs 60s then dumps raw Markdown to console.
Auth happens naturally on first use inside AI Maker (proper WT context).
Post-install message now tells user how to complete auth.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Idempotent annotation to all read-only MCP tools

MCP best practices recommend safety annotations (readOnlyHint,
destructiveHint, idempotent) on all tools. Our read-only tools
were missing Idempotent = true, which signals to clients that
these tools are safe to retry and cache.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
